title: DL-AMR: Heteroscedastic Temporal-Residual Learning for Dynamic Adaptive Mesh Refinement in Bluff-Body Wake Flows
description: Source code, OpenFOAM solver, simulation case templates, training configurations, post-processing scripts, pretrained models, and minimal reference dataset accompanying the paper of the same name. Reproduces all figures and tables.

creators.name: Jeon, Joongoo
creators.affiliation: Pohang University of Science and Technology
